'''鈭歴h-g-ng''' ('''shaganga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jell|jell]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-g-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jell|jell]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-g-ng
|-
! Lemma
| shaganga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shagangithi|shagangithi]] || [[word:shagangiji|shagangiji]] || [[word:shagangishi|shagangishi]] || [[word:shagangi|shagangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shaganguthuth|shaganguthuth]] || [[word:shagangujuj|shagangujuj]] || [[word:shagangushush|shagangushush]] || [[word:shagang|shagang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shaganguthu|shaganguthu]] || [[word:shaganguju|shaganguju]] || [[word:shagangushu|shagangushu]] || [[word:shagangu|shagangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shagangufuth|shagangufuth]] || [[word:shagangufuj|shagangufuj]] || [[word:shagangufush|shagangufush]] || [[word:shaganguf|shaganguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shagangethe|shagangethe]] || [[word:shagangeje|shagangeje]] || [[word:shagangeshe|shagangeshe]] || [[word:shagange|shagange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shagangothoth|shagangothoth]] || [[word:shagangojoj|shagangojoj]] || [[word:shagangoshosh|shagangoshosh]] || [[word:shagang|shagang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shagangotho|shagangotho]] || [[word:shagangojo|shagangojo]] || [[word:shagangosho|shagangosho]] || [[word:shagango|shagango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shagangofoth|shagangofoth]] || [[word:shagangofoj|shagangofoj]] || [[word:shagangofosh|shagangofosh]] || [[word:shagangof|shagangof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shagang忙th忙|shagang忙th忙]] || [[word:shagang忙j忙|shagang忙j忙]] || [[word:shagang忙sh忙|shagang忙sh忙]] || [[word:shagang忙|shagang忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shagangathath|shagangathath]] || [[word:shagangajaj|shagangajaj]] || [[word:shagangashash|shagangashash]] || [[word:shagang|shagang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shagangatha|shagangatha]] || [[word:shagangaja|shagangaja]] || [[word:shagangasha|shagangasha]] || [[word:shaganga|shaganga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shagangafath|shagangafath]] || [[word:shagangafaj|shagangafaj]] || [[word:shagangafash|shagangafash]] || [[word:shagangaf|shagangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shagangasha|shagangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagangasha|goshagangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagangasha|gokishagangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shagangn眉sha|shagangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagangnkn眉sha|goshagangnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagangn眉sha|gokishagangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagangsh毛sha|shagangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagangnksh毛sha|goshagangnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagangsh毛sha|gokishagangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagangrosha|shagangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagangnkrosha|goshagangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagangrosha|gokishagangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagangmusha|shagangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagangnkmusha|goshagangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagangmusha|gokishagangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagangsherasha|shagangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagangnksherasha|goshagangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagangsherasha|gokishagangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagangasha|shagangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagangnkngasha|goshagangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagangasha|gokishagangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagangyasha|shagangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagangnkyasha|goshagangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagangyasha|gokishagangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagangyamasha|shagangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagangnkyamasha|goshagangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagangyamasha|gokishagangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagangn眉sh毛sha|shagangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagangnkn眉sh毛sha|goshagangnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagangn眉sh毛sha|gokishagangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagangn眉rosha|shagangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagangnkn眉rosha|goshagangnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagangn眉rosha|gokishagangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagangn眉musha|shagangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagangnkn眉musha|goshagangnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagangn眉musha|gokishagangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagangsh毛n眉sha|shagangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagangnksh毛n眉sha|goshagangnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagangsh毛n眉sha|gokishagangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagangsh毛rosha|shagangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagangnksh毛rosha|goshagangnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagangsh毛rosha|gokishagangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagangsh毛musha|shagangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagangnksh毛musha|goshagangnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagangsh毛musha|gokishagangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagangron眉sha|shagangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagangnkron眉sha|goshagangnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagangron眉sha|gokishagangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagangrosh毛sha|shagangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagangnkrosh毛sha|goshagangnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagangrosh毛sha|gokishagangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagangromusha|shagangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagangnkromusha|goshagangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagangromusha|gokishagangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagangmun眉sha|shagangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagangnkmun眉sha|goshagangnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagangmun眉sha|gokishagangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagangmush毛sha|shagangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagangnkmush毛sha|goshagangnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagangmush毛sha|gokishagangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagangmurosha|shagangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagangnkmurosha|goshagangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagangmurosha|gokishagangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shagang|shagang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙g忙ng|sh忙g忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshagang|hoshagang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙g忙ng|hosh忙g忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshagang|hohoshagang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙g忙ng|hohosh忙g忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shagang|n眉shagang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙g忙ng|n眉sh忙g忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shagang|n眉n眉shagang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙g忙ng|n眉n眉sh忙g忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shagang|n茂shagang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙g忙ng|n茂sh忙g忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shagang|n茂n茂shagang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙g忙ng|n茂n茂sh忙g忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushagang|lushagang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙g忙ng|lush忙g忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushagang|lulushagang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙g忙ng|lulush忙g忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishagang|lishagang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙g忙ng|lish忙g忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishagang|lilishagang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙g忙ng|lilish忙g忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshagang|koshagang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙g忙ng|kosh忙g忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshagang|kokoshagang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙g忙ng|kokosh忙g忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshagang|keshagang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙g忙ng|kesh忙g忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshagang|kekeshagang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙g忙ng|kekesh忙g忙ng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
